docs.title: iladub
docs.text:
Semantic document compiling.

iladub (𒅍𒁾, Sumerian íl "to carry" + dub "tablet/document" — "tablet-bearer") is a toolkit for compiling documents into semantic, structured representations.

It is the reference implementation of the ET(K)L method, whose persistent namespace is https://w3id.org/etkl.

Note

Early development — APIs are not yet stable.

docs.title: The ET(K)L method
docs.text:
iladub is the reference implementation of the ET(K)L method.

Persistent namespace: https://w3id.org/etkl

Note

This page is a placeholder. The method description, vocabulary, and ontology are under active development. Terms will resolve under the w3id.org/etkl namespace.

docs.title: Vocabulary
docs.text: The ET(K)L vocabulary and ontology artifacts live under vocab/ and are licensed CC-BY-4.0.
